PHASE ONE FOUNDATION

COLLEGE
LACROSSE

This is the start of a MaxPreps-style college lacrosse layer for LaxHub: searchable school hubs, official roster and schedule links, rewatch destinations, recruiting-focused profile infrastructure, and eventually player-owned recruiting pages.

6
SCHOOL HUBS
Foundational team pages live
ESPN+
REWATCH SOURCES
ACCN, BTN+, FloSports, YouTube next
Portal
RECRUITING VISION
Player + coach uploads planned in phases

SCHOOL DIRECTORY

TRACK THE
PROGRAMS

ACC

DUKE

DUKE
Blue Devils • Durham, NC

Duke is one of the flagship brands in college lacrosse, with national-title expectations, high-end recruiting pull, and a steady pipeline of pro-ready talent.

National-title contender profile
ACC visibility
Strong TV and replay footprint
ACC

SYRACUSE

CUSE
Orange • Syracuse, NY

Syracuse brings one of the sport's most recognizable brands, a huge fan base, and strong weekly story volume across schedule, rankings, and player spotlight coverage.

Legacy fan base
High search demand
ACC and ESPN visibility
ACC

NOTRE DAME

ND
Fighting Irish • Notre Dame, IN

Notre Dame is a modern college lacrosse power with title-level relevance, consistent highlights, and strong replay value for both casual fans and serious recruits.

National championship relevance
Strong highlight output
Deep ACC schedule
ACC

VIRGINIA

UVA
Cavaliers • Charlottesville, VA

Virginia pairs star-power offenses with strong national interest, making the Cavaliers a high-upside school for stat pages, watch pages, and organic search traffic.

High event-level traffic
Strong TV and replay demand
Recruiting interest from fans and players
Big Ten

MARYLAND

UMD
Terrapins • College Park, MD

Maryland gives the college side an east-coast anchor program with championship expectations, recruiting gravity, and strong crossover appeal for pro-lacrosse fans.

Big Ten flagship
Strong lacrosse brand equity
High-value recruiting audience
Ivy League

PRINCETON

PU
Tigers • Princeton, NJ

Princeton helps round out the college product with Ivy League relevance, strong academic/recruiting interest, and consistent search demand around roster and schedule pages.

Ivy League demand
Strong recruiting fit content
Nationally relevant schedule
REWATCH HUBS

BUILDING A BETTER
GAME LIBRARY

Team pages will collect official game destinations and replay sources in one place, including ESPN+, ACC Network, BTN+, FloSports, YouTube, and school media pages wherever those rewatch links exist.

ESPN+ACCNBTN+FloSportsYouTubeSchool Media
RECRUITING ROADMAP

PLAYER-OWNED
PROFILE PAGES

A later phase can let high school and college players maintain recruiting profiles with film links, coach contact information, measurements, academic notes, and portal/availability status through a protected backend workflow.

Player + coach logins
Admin-approved profile updates
YouTube / Hudl / highlight links
Recruiting contact cards
